issues.display_title: Issue #3046: Update Dialog Report Comment New Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Update — Dialog Report Comment New Layout

Build the Report Comment dialog layout in the new pages-new post detail (see report-redesign spec).

Scope

  • Dialog: comment preview card (avatar + name + comment text), reason radios, optional details textarea + counter, Submit. <fieldset> + native radios. Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; light/dark.

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

  1. Layout match — comment preview + reason list + details + Submit match the design.
  2. Preview — comment text shows (clamped, wraps); missing avatar → placeholder.
  3. Selection + counter — selected reason state; textarea + counter render.
  4. Dismiss + scrim — ✕ / backdrop / Esc close; background dimmed.
  5. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; comment preview + accessible reasons + counter; dismiss; light + dark.

RESULT

  2. Channels — correct icon set, consistent sizing/spacing.

  4. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; ≥44px targets.
  5. No errors — no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; link + channels; dismiss + scrim; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

issues.display_title: Issue #3047: Update Dialog Block Post New Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Update — Dialog Block Post New Layout

Build the Block Post confirmation dialog layout in the new pages-new post detail.

Scope

  • Dialog: title, message, destructive Confirm + Cancel. Destructive (danger) styling on Confirm. Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; light/dark.

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

  1. Layout match — title + message + Confirm/Cancel match the design.
  2. Destructive styling — Confirm/Block uses danger styling, separated from Cancel.
  3. Dismiss + scrim — Cancel / ✕ / backdrop / Esc close; background dimmed.
  4. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; ≥44px targets.
  5. No errors — no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; destructive styling + dismiss + scrim; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

issues.display_title: Issue #2938: Create Report Post New Layout
issues.main_description_html:
Create Report Post New Layout

Redesign the Report Post modal for the new pages-new flow (Tailwind 4 / Zard UI, theme-adaptive light + dark).

Context

Replaces the legacy light-only Bootstrap report modal. Triggered from the post overflow menu (Report Post) on the split-panel Post Detail page and the Fullscreen viewer.

Scope (this task)

  • Preview block: panorama thumbnail (16:9, rounded, cropped to fill) + author @username line.
  • Reasons (6): Offensive/hateful · Legal issue · Privacy concern · Poor quality · Not a photo of the place · Other.
  • Free-text detail is optional, becomes required only when "Other" is selected.
  • States: default-disabled · reason selected · "Other" required · submitting · success · error.
  • Theme-adaptive (semantic tokens), single primary CTA, dismiss via ✕ / tap-outside / Esc.

Acceptance

  • Light + dark, ≥44px reason rows, contrast ≥4.5:1
  • Matches shared skeleton (header / scrolling body / pinned footer, max-h-85vh)
  • Submit disabled until a reason is chosen (and detail filled when "Other")

References

  • Design brief: docs/brainstorming/08-06-2026/ui-new-update/brainstorming.md
  • Engineering spec: docs/brainstorming/08-06-2026/ui-new-update/report-redesign.md
  • Business flow: docs/brainstorming/08-06-2026/ui-new-update/analyze-new.md

RESULT

issues.display_title: Issue #2940: Create Report User New Layout
issues.main_description_html:
Create Report User New Layout

Redesign the Report User modal for the new pages-new flow (Tailwind 4 / Zard UI, theme-adaptive light + dark).

Context

Replaces the legacy light-only Report User modal. Triggered from the post overflow menu (Report User). This is the tallest variant (9 reasons + textarea) — design it first to validate the scroll region and footer.

Scope (this task)

  • Preview block: centered larger avatar (brand gradient ring) + name + @handle — portrait-like.
  • Reasons (9): Spam · I just don't like it · Suicide/self-harm/eating disorders · Sale of illegal goods · Sexual activity or nudity · Hate speech / dangerous org · Harassment or bullying · IP infringement · Fraud / false information. (No "Other" — detail stays optional.)
  • States: default-disabled · reason selected · submitting · success · error.
  • Theme-adaptive (semantic tokens), single primary CTA, dismiss via ✕ / tap-outside / Esc.

Acceptance

  • Light + dark, ≥44px reason rows, contrast ≥4.5:1
  • 9-reason list + open keyboard on 375px stays usable; footer never crowded
  • Long reason labels wrap to two lines without breaking radio alignment
  • Matches shared skeleton (header / scrolling body / pinned footer, max-h-85vh)

References

  • Design brief: docs/brainstorming/08-06-2026/ui-new-update/brainstorming.md
  • Engineering spec: docs/brainstorming/08-06-2026/ui-new-update/report-redesign.md
  • Business flow: docs/brainstorming/08-06-2026/ui-new-update/analyze-new.md

RESULT

issues.display_title: Issue #3021: Update Hotspot & Banner Step (Add Post) Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Update — Hotspot & Banner Step (Add Post) Layout

Build the Step 2 (Hotspot & Banner) panel of the create-post wizard in pages-new/create per the UI/UX design.

Source: docs/brainstorming/12-06-2026/update-create-post/ui-design.md

Scope

  • Hotspot list area (max 5 per post) + Affiliate banner slot (max 1 per post).
  • Empty state (add hotspot / add banner CTAs) and filled state (item rows + remaining count).
  • Available for panorama and multiple post types.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark).

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: /create, advance to Step 2.

  1. Layout match — hotspot list + banner slot match the design (empty + filled).
  2. Limits — adding a 5th hotspot disables/hides "add hotspot"; adding a banner disables "add banner" (max 1).
  3. Post type — visible for panorama & multiple; behavior per design for embed (banner only).
  4. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; ≥44px targets.
  5. No errors — no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; max-5 hotspot / max-1 banner enforced in UI; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

✂️ Update — Hotspot Form (Add/Edit) Layout

Build the hotspot content form (add & edit) for create-post Step 2 per the UI/UX design.

Source: docs/brainstorming/12-06-2026/update-create-post/ui-design.md

Scope

  • Fields: Mention (user picker from a list), Title, Description, CTA Text, Link URL.
  • Support the two hotspot types (layout/fields per type as designed).
  • Add and Edit modes; Save / Cancel; field + validation states.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark); visible labels.

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: Step 2 → Add Hotspot (and Edit an existing one).

  1. Layout match — all fields (Mention, Title, Description, CTA Text, Link URL) match the design.
  2. Hotspot types — switching the hotspot type shows the correct fields/layout per type.
  3. States — empty/focus/filled/invalid (e.g. bad URL) and disabled-Save render as designed.
  4. Edit mode — opening an existing hotspot pre-fills the fields.
  5. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; all 5 fields + 2 types; add/edit + validation states; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

issues.display_title: Issue #3023: Update Panorama Selection for Hotspot Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Update — Panorama Selection for Hotspot Layout

Build the panorama selection UI for placing hotspots across panoramas in a multi-panorama post, per the UI/UX design.

Source: docs/brainstorming/12-06-2026/update-create-post/ui-design.md

Scope

  • UI to choose which panorama a hotspot belongs to (hotspots can span different panoramas within one post).
  • Thumbnail strip / selector with the active panorama indicated.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark).

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: Step 2 with a multiple post (more than one panorama).

  1. Layout match — the panorama selector matches the design; current selection clearly indicated.
  2. Switch — selecting another panorama updates which panorama the hotspot is assigned to.
  3. Single-panorama — for a single-panorama post, the selector behaves per design (hidden/disabled).
  4. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; ≥44px targets.
  5. No errors — no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; panorama selection + active indicator; multi vs single behavior; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

issues.display_title: Issue #3024: Update Banner Affiliate Selector Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Update — Banner Affiliate Selector Layout

Build the affiliate banner selector for create-post Step 2 per the UI/UX design.

Source: docs/brainstorming/12-06-2026/update-create-post/ui-design.md

Scope

  • Select one banner (max 1 per post) from the affiliate list; show the selected banner state + change/remove.
  • Available for panorama & multiple; for embed post types, banner affiliate is the only available feature.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark).

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: Step 2 → Add/Select Banner.

  1. Layout match — affiliate list + selected-banner state match the design.
  2. Max 1 — selecting a banner replaces any existing selection (only one allowed); remove clears it.
  3. Embed type — on an embed post, only the banner-affiliate feature is offered (no hotspots).
  4. Empty list — no affiliates available → designed empty state.
  5. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; single-banner rule + embed restriction; empty state; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

issues.display_title: Issue #3026: Update Hotspot & Banner (Post Detail) Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Update — Hotspot & Banner (Post Detail) Layout

Build the hotspot & banner display + dropdown-menu integration on the Post Detail viewer per the UI/UX design.

Source: docs/brainstorming/12-06-2026/update-create-post/ui-design.md

Scope

  • Render hotspots on the panorama viewer and the affiliate banner per the design; hotspot interaction (open content: title, description, CTA → link).
  • Dropdown menu integration on post detail per the design.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark).

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: open /post/<slug> of a post that has hotspots + a banner.

  1. Layout match — hotspot markers on the viewer + banner placement match the design.
  2. Hotspot open — tapping a hotspot shows its content (title, description, CTA); CTA opens the link.
  3. Banner — the affiliate banner renders per design and links correctly.
  4. Dropdown menu — the post-detail dropdown integration matches the design.
  5. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; ≥44px hotspot targets; no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; hotspot markers + content + banner + dropdown integration; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT
